views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's focus time progress ring, session count, current streak, and quick-start button for common session types

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Log a completed focus session with task name, category, duration, quality rating, and distraction count

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped session log with filtering by category and session type, showing task names, durations, and quality badges

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly focus time charts, category time distribution pie chart, peak productivity hour heatmap, focus quality trends, and AI-generated insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all sessions logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of focus sessions completed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of today's sessions where completed == true

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageFocusQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean focusQuality across all sessions in the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one completed session meeting the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for the current calendar week (Mon–Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakProductivityHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0–23) with the highest average focus quality across all sessions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes per category for the selected time range, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDistractions
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean distractionCount per session over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: chartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, totalMinutes, sessionCount) for the last 30 days for charting

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: best day, peak hour, quality trend, category dominance, distraction trend

dailyGoal.description: Target total focus minutes per day

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the user completes at least one full session (completed == true) AND total focus minutes >= 25 (one standard pomodoro)
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week's total focus minutes and average quality against the previous week. Track 30-day rolling average of daily focus minutes. Monitor distraction count trend (decreasing = improving focus discipline).
insights: Peak hour: 'You focus best at [hour] — schedule deep work then'
Category dominance: 'You spent [X]% of focus time on [category] this week'
Quality trend: 'Your focus quality improved/declined [X]% vs last week'
Distraction improvement: 'Distractions down [X]% — your focus discipline is strengthening'
Completion rate: '[X]% of sessions completed without early termination'
Streak milestone: 'You've maintained focus for [N] days straight — personal best!'
Optimal duration: 'Your highest quality sessions are [type] — consider using this format more'
